caption: In a brightly lit indoor dining area, three people are gathered around a table. A blonde woman wearing a white strap top with floral embroidery and a red necklace sits next to a man with curly brown hair wearing a gray t-shirt. To the far left and right edges of the scene, a person in a light blue shirt is partially visible. The table is set with white plates, orange bowls, and glasses of yellow juice. In the background, a white shelving unit holds various containers and kitchen items. Throughout the sequence, the blonde woman speaks and shifts her gaze, first looking toward the man with curly hair and then turning her head slightly away with a smile. The man remains relatively still, looking forward with a neutral expression. The person in the blue shirt remains partially in the frame, their movement minimal as the woman interacts.
